Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridDocOrigem.Rows = Page.Rows &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage = 1 &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridDocOrigemPageCount = -1 GridDetalhamentos.Rows = Page.Rows &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage = 1 &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridDetalhamentosPageCount = -1 GridProdutos.Rows = Page.Rows &GridProdutosCurrentPage = 1 &GridProdutosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridProdutosPageCount = -1 GridReceitas.Rows = Page.Rows &GridReceitasCurrentPage = 1 &GridReceitasCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridReceitasPageCount = -1 GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridDocOrigem.Rows GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridDetalhamentos.Rows GridProdutosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridProdutos.Rows GridReceitasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridReceitas.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridDocOrigemPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridDetalhamentosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridProdutosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridReceitasPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage = GridDetalhamentos.CurrentPage &GridDetalhamentosPageCount = GridDetalhamentos.PageCount &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage = GridDocOrigem.CurrentPage &GridDocOrigemPageCount = GridDocOrigem.PageCount &GridProdutosCurrentPage = GridProdutos.CurrentPage &GridProdutosPageCount = GridProdutos.PageCount &GridReceitasCurrentPage = GridReceitas.currentPage &GridReceitasPageCount = GridReceitas.PageCount EndEvent Event GridDocOrigem.Load &DocGnreConUfeCod = GnreConUfeCod &DocGnreConRecCod = GnreConRecCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditarDoc = !'' &ExcluirDoc = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDetalhamentos.Load &DetGnreConUfeCod = GnreConUfeCod &DetGnreConRecCod = GnreConRecCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditarDet = !'' &ExcluirDet = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridProdutos.Load &ProGnreConUfeCod = GnreConUfeCod &ProGnreConRecCod = GnreConRecCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditarPro = !'' &ExcluirPro = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridReceitas.Load &RecGnreConUfeCod = GnreConUfeCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &EditarRec = !'' &ExcluirRec = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage -= 1 GridDocOrigem.PreviousPage() Case GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage += 1 GridDocOrigem.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridDocOrigem.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridDocOrigem.Rows = GridDocOrigemPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridDocOrigemCurrentPage = 1 GridDocOrigem.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage -= 1 GridDetalhamentos.PreviousPage() Case GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage += 1 GridDetalhamentos.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridDetalhamentos.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridDetalhamentos.Rows = GridDetalhamentosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridDetalhamentosCurrentPage = 1 GridDetalhamentos.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridProdutosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridProdutosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridProdutosCurrentPage -= 1 GridProdutos.PreviousPage() Case GridProdutosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridProdutosCurrentPage += 1 GridProdutos.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridProdutosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridProdutosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridProdutos.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridProdutosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridProdutos.Rows = GridProdutosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridProdutosCurrentPage = 1 GridProdutos.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridReceitasPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridReceitasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridReceitasCurrentPage -= 1 GridReceitas.PreviousPage() Case GridReceitasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridReceitasCurrentPage += 1 GridReceitas.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridReceitasPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridReceitasCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridReceitas.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridReceitasPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridReceitas.Rows = GridReceitasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridReceitasCurrentPage = 1 GridReceitas.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EditarDoc.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EditarDoc_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarDoc_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('UPD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &DocGnreConUfeCod, &DocGnreConRecCod, GnreConDocCod, GnreConDocDes, 'DOC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarDoc_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ExcluirDoc.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ExcluirDoc_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirDoc_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('DLT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &DocGnreConUfeCod, &DocGnreConRecCod, GnreConDocCod, GnreConDocDes, 'DOC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirDoc_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EditarDet.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EditarDet_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarDet_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('UPD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &DetGnreConUfeCod, &DetGnreConRecCod, GnreConDetCod, GnreConDetDes, 'DET') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarDet_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ExcluirDet.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ExcluirDet_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirDet_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('DLT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &DetGnreConUfeCod, &DetGnreConRecCod, GnreConDetCod, GnreConDetDes, 'DET') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirDet_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EditarPro.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EditarPro_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarPro_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('UPD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProGnreConUfeCod, &ProGnreConRecCod, GnreConProCod, GnreConProDes, 'PRO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarPro_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ExcluirPro.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('DLT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProGnreConUfeCod, &ProGnreConRecCod, GnreConProCod, GnreConProDes, 'PRO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirPro_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EditarRec.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EditarRec_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarRec_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('UPD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &RecGnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConRecDes, 'REC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EditarRec_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ExcluirRec.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ExcluirRec_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirRec_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcGerenciarConfGnre.Create('DLT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &RecGnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConRecDes, 'REC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ExcluirRec_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVoltar' Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FileUploadDocOrigem.UploadComplete For &FileUploadData In &FileUploadDataColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source = &FileUploadData.File &Extensao = &FileUploadData.Extension &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close() Do Case Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'csv' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Arquivo correto. Iniciando Importação." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &Random = Random() * 10000000000 //## Gera um número aleatório para o ID do Progresso &ProgressId = 'ImportaGNREDOC' + trim(Str(&Random)) TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 1 ScaprogressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId ScaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) ScaProgressBar1.Start() prcImportaConfigGNRE.Submit(&ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &selectedURL, 'DOC', &ProgressId) Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() <> 'csv' &Mensagem = 'Atenção! O arquivo importado é ' + &Extensao.ToFormattedString() + ', esse Layout é diferente de .csv não desenvolvido! Contate o Suporte.' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) OtherWise msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Arquivo incorreto." ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndCase EndIf EndFor &FileUploadDataColl.clear() FileUploadDocOrigem.Clear() EndEvent Event ScaProgressBar1.OnComplete msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registros importados com Sucesso!" ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 0 RefresH EndEvent Event FileUploadDetalhamentos.UploadComplete For &FileUploadData In &FileUploadDetalhamentoColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source = &FileUploadData.File &Extensao = &FileUploadData.Extension &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close() Do Case Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'csv' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Arquivo correto. Iniciando Importação." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &Random = Random() * 10000000000 //## Gera um número aleatório para o ID do Progresso ProgressId = 'ImportaGNREDET' + trim(Str(&Random)) TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 1 ScaprogressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId ScaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) ScaProgressBar1.Start() prcImportaConfigGNRE.Submit(&ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &selectedURL, 'DET', &ProgressId) Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() <> 'csv' &Mensagem = 'Atenção! O arquivo importado é ' + &Extensao.ToFormattedString() + ', esse Layout é diferente de .csv não desenvolvido! Contate o Suporte.' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) OtherWise msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Arquivo incorreto." ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndCase EndIf EndFor &FileUploadDetalhamentoColl.clear() FileUploadDetalhamentos.Clear() EndEvent Event FileUploadProduto.UploadComplete For &FileUploadData In &FileUploadProdutoColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source = &FileUploadData.File &Extensao = &FileUploadData.Extension &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close() Do Case Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'csv' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Arquivo correto. Iniciando Importação." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &Random = Random() * 10000000000 //## Gera um número aleatório para o ID do Progresso ProgressId = 'ImportaGNREPRO' + trim(Str(&Random)) TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 1 ScaprogressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId ScaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) ScaProgressBar1.Start() prcImportaConfigGNRE.Submit(&ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &selectedURL, 'PRO', &ProgressId) Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() <> 'csv' &Mensagem = 'Atenção! O arquivo importado é ' + &Extensao.ToFormattedString() + ', esse Layout é diferente de .csv não desenvolvido! Contate o Suporte.' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) OtherWise msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Arquivo incorreto." ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndCase EndIf EndFor &FileUploadProdutoColl.clear() FileUploadProduto.Clear() EndEvent Event FileUploadReceita.UploadComplete For &FileUploadData In &FileUploadReceitaColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source = &FileUploadData.File &Extensao = &FileUploadData.Extension &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close() Do Case Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() = 'csv' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Arquivo correto. Iniciando Importação." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &Random = Random() * 10000000000 //## Gera um número aleatório para o ID do Progresso ProgressId = 'ImportaGNREREC' + trim(Str(&Random)) TbScanProgressBar.Visible = 1 ScaprogressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId ScaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) ScaProgressBar1.Start() prcImportaConfigGNRE.Submit(&ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &selectedURL, 'REC', &ProgressId) Case &Extensao.ToLower().Trim() <> 'csv' &Mensagem = 'Atenção! O arquivo importado é ' + &Extensao.ToFormattedString() + ', esse Layout é diferente de .csv não desenvolvido! Contate o Suporte.' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem, DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) OtherWise msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Arquivo incorreto." ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndCase EndIf EndFor &FileUploadReceitaColl.clear() FileUploadReceita.Clear() EndEvent
